message:
test(vt): add wide char + SGR erase + ICH/DCH/ECH unit tests (bd-2syeq)

Comprehensive unit tests for wide character boundary cleanup in erase/edit
operations, SGR style inheritance in erased cells, and edge cases for
ICH/DCH/ECH at wide char boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
